title: Geographic Health: Regional Status on Global Map
description: Displays multicloud instance health status by region with geographic coordinates for global map visualization. Shows healthy, degraded, and unreachable instances across OCI, Azure, and GCP regions. Use with the Map visualization type in OCI Log Analytics.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Multicloud Health Logs' | stats count as heartbeats, unique('Host Name') as instances by 'Cloud Provider', 'Latitude', 'Longitude', 'Status' | sort 'Cloud Provider'
falsepositives: Network partitions causing temporary unreachable status
